name: @centraid/desktop
description: Centraid desktop — Electron shell + vanilla-TS renderer. Consumes @centraid/design-tokens.

scripts.build: bun run build:ts && bun run build:preload && bun run build:assets
scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist/renderer && cp src/renderer/index.html src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build && playwright test -c tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts
